services.name: backend
services.description: FastAPI backend exposing REST endpoints for recipe CRUD, tagging, search (title/ingredient/tag), favorites, and dashboard activity. Validates FusionAuth-issued JWTs via JWKS, reads roles from the JWT claims to enforce user/admin authorization, and persists data in Postgres.

services.name: frontend
services.description: React + TypeScript + Vite SPA providing signup/login flows, the 'My Recipes' authenticated shell, recipe create/edit/view/delete forms, search and tag filtering, favorites toggling, and the dashboard view showing favorites and recent activity.

services.name: db
services.description: Postgres database storing recipe data (recipes, ingredients, instructions, tags, favorites) for the backend and also backing the FusionAuth identity store.

services.name: auth
services.description: FusionAuth identity provider handling user signup, login, JWT issuance, and role management (user, admin). The backend validates issued JWTs via JWKS.

description: A personal recipe-management web app where home cooks save, organize, search, tag, and favorite recipes. Users sign up and log in via FusionAuth; a FastAPI backend persists recipes in Postgres; a React frontend provides the UI for browsing, searching, and managing the recipe collection. Admins can view all recipes for moderation.
